title: Queens DA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across Queens County District Attorney (queensda.org) object schemas. There is NO NYC Open Data corpus for a District Attorney; these definitions instead reconcile fields reverse-engineered from the office's WordPress content (press releases, court-case posts, cold-case posts) exposed through the accidental WordPress REST API (wp-json/wp/v2), plus the NYC geography spine so DA content can join back to the rest of city government. Because all five borough DA offices run the same functions, these definitions are drafted to be shareable across a single five-borough DA API.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

Publication.description: Publishing metadata carried by every WordPress-sourced object — the fields the wp-json/wp/v2 REST API actually returns.

language.description: WPML content language code (site is multilingual).

categories.description: WordPress category slugs (e.g. press-releases, court-cases, indictments).

CaseReference.description: A reference to a criminal case / prosecution as named in public DA content. DA offices publish only what is on the public record; no sealed or non-public case data is implied.

caption.description: Public case caption (People v. …) as announced.

docketOrIndictment.description: Docket or indictment number if published.

court.description: Court where the matter is pending (e.g. Queens Supreme Court, Criminal Court).

ContactPoint.description: A public point of contact for a resource, program, or unit.
